notes: Captured starters, entrees, desserts, and to-go cocktails from Betty's online menu; a Take and Bake dinner package is included as a note item. No wine or beer list was present in the raw text, so beverages are limited to the four listed to-go cocktails. Menu appears to be a snapshot that may shift with seasons.

dishes.name: Take and Bake Dinner for Two
dishes.description: Two slices of either Crow lasagne (contains sausage) or Betty lasagna (meatless), a large mixed greens salad with herbed vinaigrette, and either 2 portions of dessert or a bottle of wine. Allow 30 minutes cooking time.

dishes.name: Fancy Bread
dishes.description: Macrina Bakery baguette, honey butter, herbed olive oil, garlic confit. Optional add-ons: brie & preserves (+$6) or salame & giardiniera (+$5).
dishes.price_note: Add brie & preserves $6; add salame & giardiniera $5

dishes.name: Oysters on the Half Shell
dishes.description: Citrus fennel mignonette.

dishes.name: Roasted Corn Bisque
dishes.description: Chili oil, chives.

dishes.name: Mixed Artisan Greens
dishes.description: Shaved parmesan, herbed vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Cherry Salad
dishes.description: Gem lettuce, shaved fennel, local cherries, marcona almond yogurt.

dishes.name: Shaved Asparagus Salad
dishes.description: Arugula, asparagus ribbons, manchego, lemon-tahini vinaigrette, hazelnut dukkah.

dishes.name: Calamari & Shishito Peppers
dishes.description: Fried calamari, blistered shishito peppers, remoulade, lemon.

dishes.name: Smoked Salmon Spread
dishes.description: House-smoked salmon, crostini.

dishes.name: Oven Roasted Chicken
dishes.description: Red potatoes, seasonal vegetables, roasted garlic cloves, pan jus.

dishes.name: Steak & Frites
dishes.description: 12oz prime grade ribeye, red wine reduction, hand-cut frites.

dishes.name: Smoked Baby Back Ribs
dishes.description: Half rack house smoked baby back ribs, coleslaw, cornbread muffin, honey butter, house barbeque sauce.

dishes.name: Chinook Salmon
dishes.description: Pan-seared organic chinook salmon, summer vegetable succotash, kaiware sprouts.

dishes.name: Betty's Lasagna
dishes.description: Handmade pasta, spinach and mushroom ragu, ricotta, basil pesto, bechamel, parmesan, lemon-cream sauce.

dishes.name: Crow's Lasagna
dishes.description: Handmade pasta, Italian sausage, marinara, basil pesto, béchamel, parmesan.

dishes.name: The Betty Burger
dishes.description: A half pound Double R Ranch beef, handmade brioche bun, white cheddar, hand-cut frites.

dishes.name: Side of Hand-Cut Frites
dishes.description: Hand-cut frites. Fryers use highly refined peanut oil.

dishes.name: Kids' Pasta
dishes.description: Choice of marinara, or butter & cheese.

dishes.name: Atlantic Beach Pie
dishes.description: Lemon & lime curd, house-made saltine cracker crust, grand marnier whipped cream, blackberry coulis, lemon chip.

dishes.name: Strawberry Rhubarb Upside-Down Cake
dishes.description: Strawberry caramel, fresh rhubarb, cornmeal olive oil cake, spruce tip ice cream, strawberry coulis.

dishes.name: Chocolate Mint Tartufo
dishes.description: Mint leaf ice cream, chocolate brownie, crunchy bittersweet chocolate shell, mint syrup.

beverages.name: Betty's Choice
beverages.style: Custom stirred, chilled to-go cocktail (5oz); guest chooses base spirit
